name: PoopCraft
author: sn3akrr
description: You can now poop on your PocketMine-MP server! PoopCraft is a highly customizable poop plugin, which allows you to poop in many different ways!
readme_markdown:
You can now poop on your PocketMine-MP server! PoopCraft is a highly customizable poop plugin, which allows you to poop in many different ways!

Command Usage

/poop sneak - Poop every time you sneak

/poop hand - Poop the item in your hand out

/poop inv - Poop out every item in your inventory individually

/poop jetpack - Fly with a poop jetpack every time you sneak

Permissions

poop.command - Access to the poop command

poop.sneak - Access to the sneak feature

poop.hand - Access to the poop hand feature

poop.all - Access to the poop inventory feature

poop.jetpack - Access to the poop jetpack feature

Config

The config is fairly simple! Once you download this plugin, start up your server and a default config will be saved. Here you can select what players are allowed to use which commands, and also modify your poop sound, poop force, rate of poop, and poop jetpack force.

Languages

Want PoopCraft to support a different language? Feel free to create a pull request on my GitHub!
